caption: A man in a grey t-shirt and headphones sits in a studio setting, partially obscured by a large computer monitor, speaking into a professional microphone. In front of him, a smaller screen displays a video of three people outdoors in a park-like setting with autumn foliage. In this embedded video, a man in a mustard-colored shirt and a person in a brown top raise glasses for a toast with a man wearing a red sweater. The embedded video features three circular icons at the bottom with accompanying text: "Herbal Powder Cost", "BPH Free", and "Urins Not Smeel". Across the sequence, the man in the studio maintains a focused expression while speaking, with slight shifts in his facial muscles and lip position. The embedded video remains static, showing the same moment of the toast in every frame.
